prompts.text: Multi-tenant SaaS for invoice billing with Stripe and team settings
Subscription analytics SaaS with MRR chart and churn table
Customer feedback SaaS with NPS surveys and response inbox
API keys management SaaS with usage meters and rate limits
Documentation SaaS with sidebar nav and full-text search
Onboarding checklist SaaS for new hires with progress tracking
Compliance audit SaaS with evidence uploads and reviewer workflow
Email campaign SaaS with template editor and send analytics
Feature flag SaaS with environments and rollout percentage
Warehouse ops SaaS with pick lists and shipment labels
